# Bitwise Precedence

Bitwise operations with operator precedence

```perl
$result = $a | $b & $c ^ $d;
```

# Expected Compilation Outcomes

## Bitwise Precedence

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$result = $a | $b & $c ^ $d;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$result = $a | $b & $c ^ $d;
```

### Inferred Perl Output

```perl
# Type inference not yet fully implemented
```
